# Dna Sequencing

**Summary**: The process of determining the nucleic acid sequence of DNA to identify and characterize organisms.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015]] used 18S rDNA sequencing to perform molecular characterization of benthic foraminifera.

## Key Results and Findings

- Molecular analysis yielded amplification of specimens belonging to four groups: Ammonia, Murrayinella, Glabratellina, and Elphidium. ([[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015, p. 83]])
